title: CIRCE Criteria Base Schema
description: Base criteria type and geographic criteria for the CIRCE cohort expression data model. All domain-specific criteria types extend this base. This file is standalone to avoid circular dependencies between common and groups schemas.

Criteria.description: Base criteria type. All domain-specific criteria inherit from this. In JSON, each criteria is serialized with a polymorphic wrapper: {"ConditionOccurrence": {...}}. The discriminator is the single key in the object. Polymorphic base: each concrete type extends this with domain-specific fields and wraps in {"TypeName": {...}}

GeoCriteria.description: Base class for geographic criteria (extends Criteria).
